svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="draw.io" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="tensor-flow" name="张量数据流"> <mxGraphModel dx="1174" dy="630" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1050" pageHeight="240" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="cpu" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F4FD;strokeColor=#4A90D9;fontColor=#2C3E50;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="CPU Host<br>内存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="110" x="30" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" edge="1" parent="1" source="cpu" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4A90D9;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="device" value="拷贝模型参数和输入"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="14" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="230" y="113" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="device" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontColor=#2C3E50;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="NPU Device<br>HBM内存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="130" x="250" y="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" edge="1" parent="1" source="device" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4A90D9;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="444" y="113" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="op1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontColor=#2C3E50;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="OP1 执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="100" x="445" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" edge="1" parent="1" source="op1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4A90D9;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="op2" value="Device内存传递"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0095" y="12" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="635" y="113" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="op2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontColor=#2C3E50;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="OP2 执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="100" x="650" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a-dot" edge="1" parent="1" source="op2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4A90D9;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="785" y="113" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dots" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=22;fontColor=#999999;" value="…" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="40" x="788" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a-dot-n" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4A90D9;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="opn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontColor=#2C3E50;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="OP N 执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="120" x="870" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a4" edge="1" parent="1" source="opn" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4A90D9;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="cpu" value="回传输出结果"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0011" y="-14" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="930" y="185" /> <mxPoint x="85" y="185" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rh" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;fillColor=#FAFAFA;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#999999;rounded=1;arcSize=12;" value="Host" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="110" x="30" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rd" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;fillColor=#FAFAFA;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#999999;rounded=1;arcSize=12;" value="Device" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="740" x="250" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="div" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#DDDDDD;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3UV0nQ3LA14mwWFqim-M-1" edge="1" parent="1" source="dots" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4A90D9;exitX=1.005;exitY=0.6;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="836" y="112.8" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="870" y="112.8" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
